channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Butler, Curry lead Warriors past Grizzlies 121-116 to secure seventh seed in West playoffs
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jimmy Butler and Stephen Curry threw their arms around each other and embraced. Playoff Jimmy in all his brilliance on the big stage took all the pressure off Curry, and now they're taking the Golden State Warriors to the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Anthony, Magic claim 7th seed with 120-95 win over Hawks in Play-In Tournament
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Cole Anthony came off the bench with 26 points and six assists to lead the Orlando Magic to a 120-95 win over the Atlanta Hawks on Tuesday night in the first game of the Play-In Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tyler Soderstrom hits a pair of 3-run home runs and the Athletics beat the White Sox 12-3
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Tyler Soderstrom hit a pair of three-run home runs, his major league-leading seventh and eighth homers of the season, and the Athletics beat the Chicago White Sox 12-3 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs can't hold lead, MLB-best Padres surge late to win opening game of 3-game series in San Diego
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — The Cubs' West Coast gauntlet against two of the best teams in baseball rolls on this week, with two games left.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Ivan Demidov scores in NHL debut with Montreal Canadiens
item.description: MONTREAL (AP) — Ivan Demidov made quite the first impression in his anticipated NHL debut on Monday night. The 19-year-old Russian forward had a goal and an assist in the first period of Montreal's 4-3 shootout loss against Chicago. The Canadiens wasted an opportunity to clinch a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz close out season with 116-105 loss at Minnesota
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The NBA season has mercifully come to an end for the Utah Jazz. The Jazz ended the worst season in franchise history with a 116-105 loss to the Minnesota Timberwolves, who were led by Anthony Edwards with 43 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kansas man who was falsely accused of being a shooter after Chiefs’ 2024 Super Bowl win has died
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — A Kansas man who was falsely accused of being among the shooters who opened fire at a rally celebrating the Kansas City Chiefs’ Super Bowl victory last year has died, his attorney said. Denton Loudermill Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Thunder crush Jazz in home finale, 145-111
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz home finale was pretty representative of the entire season. The Jazz got blown out by the Oklahoma City Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox enter matchup with the Red Sox on losing streak
item.description: Boston Red Sox (7-7, third in the AL East) vs. Chicago White Sox (2-10, fifth in the AL Central) Chicago; Friday, 7:40 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
